phases.name: Seoul + GA + peering + ECR replication - infra

Chunk 1 module refactor (Oregon->modules/fleet, moved{} zero-destroy proven against live state). Chunk 2 ECR + Secrets Manager cross-region replication (config-driven import). Chunk 3 terraform/seoul module reuse + cross-region peering accepter + overlays/seoul + region-scoped root-app. Chunk 4 Seoul RDS read replica (hardened param group) + Redis REPLICAOF + Seoul<->Oregon peering. Chunk 5 Global Accelerator + entry-plane spec. Redis cross-region exposure (NodePort + requirepass, back-compat) and terraform/rds Seoul return route now CLOSED (2026-07-13). Open live-only items: REDIS_AUTH_HOST/REPLICAOF endpoint IP injection at ArgoCD sync; Traefik failover CRD + Cloudflare mTLS (entry-plane.md). Oregon cutover: oregon-cutover-runbook.md; Part A access automated (SSM kubeconfig + oregon-verify.sh).
